ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* International Organization for Standardization (ISO) code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_freedom_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall economic freedom score */,
  "property_rights" REAL /* Score for property rights */,
  "government_integrity" REAL /* Score for government integrity */,
  "judicial_effectiveness" REAL /* Score for judicial effectiveness */,
  "tax_burden" REAL /* Score for tax burden */,
  "government_spending" REAL /* Score for government spending */,
  "fiscal_health" REAL /* Score for fiscal health */,
  "business_freedom" REAL /* Score for business freedom */,
  "labor_freedom" REAL /* Score for labor freedom */,
  "monetary_freedom" REAL /* Score for monetary freedom */,
  "trade_freedom" REAL /* Score for trade freedom */,
  "investment_freedom" REAL /* Score for investment freedom */,
  "financial_freedom" REAL /* Score for financial freedom */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) per capita */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_freedom_index_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_freedom_index_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage assigned to the indicator in the overall score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Starting date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Ending date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the submission */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year associated with the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submissions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submissions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data submission being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES data_submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each national agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the national agency */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the agency */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_national_agencies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ngo_partners" (
  "ngo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NGO */,
  "ngo_name" TEXT /* Name of the NGO */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the NGO */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the NGO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ngo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ngo_partners_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
